name: University of Botswana
description: The national university offering a wide range of undergraduate programmes in sciences, humanities, business, education, and health sciences.

name: BIUST
description: Botswana International University of Science and Technology - focused on science, engineering, and technology programmes with strong lab and industry links.

name: Botswana School of Business Sciences
description: Formerly Botswana Accountancy College (BAC): a multi-disciplinary institution offering business, finance, computing, hospitality, logistics, and insurance, with campuses in Gaborone and Francistown. Undergraduate qualifications are NCQF-aligned and BQA-accredited; from 2026/27 newly admitted undergraduates are awarded by BSBS, while continuing students complete under existing partnership arrangements. Postgraduate awards remain on existing collaborative routes.

name: Botho University
description: Large private university with broad undergraduate and postgraduate offerings in business, health, computing, education, and the social sciences.

name: BA ISAGO University
description: Private university focused on business, law, computing, and management programmes with strong links to industry and professional practice.

name: ABM University College
description: University college known for health sciences, education, and business-related programmes, combining academic study with workplace preparation.

name: Limkokwing University of Creative Technology
description: Creative and technology-led institution offering design, multimedia, ICT, and entrepreneurship-oriented programmes in a project-based environment.

name: Francistown College of Education
description: Public teacher-education college preparing secondary and primary educators with emphasis on classroom practice and national curriculum alignment.

name: Gaborone Technical College
description: Technical and vocational college offering certificates and diplomas in engineering trades, applied technology, and occupational programmes.
